messages.content: # Here is how to fix " Steam Authentication Failed "

## Steam servers are down for maintenance every Tuesday
> Please be patient as they come back online after 10 minutes to 1 hour.

# Method 1
## If it isn't a Tuesday and you still get the error message
> Make sure steam is open first and make sure you are whitelisted here https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1000157728737599691

# Method 2
> - Make sure you're logged into the correct steam account
> - Restart steam
> - Log out and back into the account
> - Restart PC
> - Restart your internet router
> - Reconnect your steam account in CM (Content Manager) <#1195317872197644358> link steam to content manager
